page.title: Package Template Management
page.description: Manage traffic package templates, assign packages to users in user management

dialog.createDesc: Create a new traffic package template
dialog.name: Package Name *
dialog.trafficModeDesc: In two-way mode, user traffic is counted at 2x
dialog.speedLimitDesc: Max download speed per user, 0 for unlimited
dialog.deviceLimitDesc: Max concurrent devices per user, 0 for unlimited
dialog.nodesHint: Select nodes this package can use (none selected means all nodes)
dialog.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete package template "{{name}}"?

toast.trafficPositive: Traffic quota must be greater than 0
toast.cyclePositive: Billing cycle must be greater than 0
toast.externalNodeWarning: Note: External node traffic is not counted in package traffic!
